description: Feature queue M.E.R.L.I.N. — S1 COMPLETE. S2+S3+S4 active. 40 pending (T-S2-ARC-CONDITION-REGRESS-V2 completed, 6 new E2E tasks added by SPEC-14).

sprints.S1: COMPLETE — Core loop jouable, bugs critiques fixes, LLM valide
sprints.S2: CONTENU & SYSTEMES — biomes, verbes, MOS, cleanup restant
sprints.S3: POLISH & ROBUSTESSE — edge cases, LLM robustesse, UX, pixel render
sprints.S4: INTEGRATION & EXPORT — web build, CI/CD, demo jouable

rules.auto_generate_when_below: If fewer than 10 pending tasks remain, read docs/DEV_PLAN_V2.5.md and docs/GAME_DESIGN_BIBLE.md to generate new tasks until 10+ pending.
rules.task_decomposition: Each task must be completable in 1 cycle (~15 min). Break large features into atomic tasks.
rules.priority_algorithm: P0=critical bugs, P1-P5=sprint current, P6-P10=sprint next, P11+=backlog

tasks.title: Cycle jour/nuit PS1 + DA cohérente toutes scènes (remplace S3-AMBIENT + S3-PIXEL)
tasks.description: Director q-20260413-003 + q-20260412-002 + q-20260412-004: Unified visual task replacing S3-AMBIENT-LIGHTING and S3-PIXEL-RENDER. Cycle jour/nuit en mode PS1 avec volumétrie. Temps réel machine/serveur pour saisons et cycle quotidien. DA cohérente entre TOUTES les scènes et animations. Effets visuels: pixel snap, affine textures, low-poly volumetric fog, dithering shadows, viewport scale. Exposer time_of_day + season dans run state + LLM context. Tout doit être driver sous la même logique graphique. Director note: 'toute la DA doit être cohérente entre toutes les scènes, animations. Tout doit être driver sous la même logique graphique sur l'ensemble des rendus graphiques.'

tasks.title: Typographie hybride: titre celtique + corps sans-serif
tasks.description: Director q-003: FONT_TITLE (celtique) + FONT_BODY (sans-serif) dans MerlinVisual.

tasks.title: Memoire narrative: RAG pour resume compresse story_log
tasks.description: Director q-001: RAG-based narrative memory. add_narrative_entry() per card, get_narrative_summary() for 3-5 items.

tasks.title: Configurer export web HTML5 automatise
tasks.description: Setup Godot HTML5 export. Verify SharedArrayBuffer headers. Output to web-export/.

tasks.title: Refonte Menu Principal
tasks.description: Meilleure introduction, shaders et graphismes PS1 avec bonne volumétrie et cycle jour/nuit, la scène doit être plus viable. Deep dive et itère jusqu'à acceptation du retour correct

tasks.title: Add amb_iles ambient sound for iles_celtes biome
tasks.description: S4-SFXMANAGER-AUDIT: 7/8 biome ambients registered. Missing: amb_iles for iles_celtes biome. SFXManager.play_biome_ambient('iles') silently fails. Fix: (1) Add gen_amb_iles() to SFXRecipesAmbient (ocean waves: low freq sine sweep + white noise, ~2s loop). (2) Add 'amb_iles' to names[] in SFXManager._generate_all_sounds(). LOW priority — iles_celtes is a late-game biome (maturity score 45+).

tasks.title: Refactor _reduce() megafunction: dispatch to sub-reducers
tasks.description: SPECIALIST-10 PQ-005: _reduce() at line 243 is 256 lines — 5x function limit. It's a giant match block handling ALL action types. Refactor: extract 4 sub-reducer helpers called from _reduce(): _reduce_run_actions(), _reduce_meta_actions(), _reduce_ui_actions(), _reduce_system_actions(). Each sub-reducer takes (state, action_type, payload) and returns bool (handled). _reduce() dispatches to correct sub-reducer based on action prefix. Maintains same external API. No logic changes — pure structural split.

tasks.title: Split _resolve_choice() in merlin_game_controller.gd (211 lines)
tasks.description: SPECIALIST-10 PQ-006: _resolve_choice() at line 499 is 211 lines. Mixed UI transitions + game state mutation + LLM trigger. Extract: (1) _resolve_choice_validate(choice_idx) -> bool — validates choice index bounds. (2) _resolve_choice_apply_effects(card, choice_idx) — calls store.dispatch() for game effects. (3) _resolve_choice_transition() — handles fade-out + scene transition. (4) _resolve_choice_trigger_llm() — schedules next card generation. Keep _resolve_choice() as orchestrator calling these 4 helpers in sequence. Each helper < 50 lines.

tasks.title: Split _wrap_text_as_card() in merlin_llm_adapter.gd (222 lines)
tasks.description: SPECIALIST-10 PQ-007: _wrap_text_as_card() at line 435 is 222 lines — parses raw LLM text, validates structure, and wraps into card dict all in one function. Extract: (1) _parse_raw_llm_text(text) -> Dictionary — parses options/title/effects from raw text. (2) _validate_card_structure(card) -> bool — checks required fields, effect caps, option count. (3) _wrap_text_as_card() becomes orchestrator calling parse → validate → assemble. Each helper < 60 lines.

tasks.title: Extract _poll_bg_tasks() + _poll_swarm_health() from _process() in merlin_ai.gd
tasks.description: SPECIALIST-10 PQ-008: _process() at line 2045 is 68 lines — exceeds 50-line limit. Logic: (1) swarm scheduler timeout check, (2) legacy timeout check, (3) poll active bg tasks, (4) dispatch queue. Extract: _poll_swarm_health() (lines ~2053-2076), _poll_legacy_timeouts() (lines ~2077-2086), _poll_active_tasks() -> Array[int] (lines ~2090-2107), process_completed_tasks(indices) (lines ~2109-2124). _process() becomes 20 lines calling these helpers. set_process(false) guard preserved.

tasks.title: Reduce 5+ level nesting in llm_adapter_text_sanitizer.gd
tasks.description: SPECIALIST-10 PQ-009: 22 instances of 5+ tab nesting in blacklist filtering and label extraction loops (lines 127-189). Use early-return guards and const extraction to flatten. Pattern: for word in list: if word in blacklist: (5 tabs deep) → replace with: if _is_blacklisted(word): continue. Extract _is_blacklisted() helper + NON_VERB_BLACKLIST const at class level.

tasks.title: Audit + fix parchment_display add_child orphan risk in merlin_game_controller.gd
tasks.description: SPECIALIST-10 PQ-010: _resolve_choice() calls add_child(_parchment) at line 317 but parchment node has no explicit queue_free or signal disconnect on scene exit. Risk: if _resolve_choice() is called while a previous parchment is still transitioning, duplicate nodes accumulate. Fix: (1) Check is_instance_valid(_parchment) + _parchment.is_inside_tree() before add_child. (2) Store reference and call queue_free on previous if still alive. (3) Or use CONNECT_ONE_SHOT pattern for animation_finished signal to auto-cleanup.

tasks.title: Extend _validate_run_state() with life_max + faction_rep_delta type checks
tasks.description: SPECIALIST-9 CHK-2: _validate_run_state() currently only checks biome (String), card_index (numeric), life_essence (numeric), anam_accumulated (now added P23). Missing: (1) life_max should be numeric >= 1. (2) faction_rep_delta should be Dictionary with all 5 faction keys. (3) cards_played should be numeric >= 0. Add typeof checks for life_max + cards_played. Add dict-has-key checks for faction_rep_delta (same pattern as _validate() faction loop). Keep _validate_run_state() < 50 lines.

tasks.title: Clamp fins_vues + total_runs to maxi(0) in load_profile()
tasks.description: SPECIALIST-9: load_profile() clamps meta['anam'] to maxi(0) at line 147 but does NOT clamp fins_vues or total_runs. A tampered save with fins_vues=-999 would pass _validate() (is numeric) but give incorrect arc condition results (fins_vues >= 5 check would never fire). Fix: after line 151 (faction_rep clamp), add: meta['fins_vues'] = maxi(int(meta.get('fins_vues', 0)), 0) and meta['total_runs'] = maxi(int(meta.get('total_runs', 0)), 0). Consistent with existing anam clamp pattern.

tasks.title: Validate echo_memory sub-keys in _validate()
tasks.description: SPECIALIST-9 CHK-8: echo_memory presence now validated (is Dictionary). Sub-keys not validated: deaths_by_biome (should be Dict), dominant_factions_seen (should be Array), choices_log (should be Array). A corrupted echo_memory sub-key would cause silent type errors in analytics code. Fix: add _validate_echo_memory(echo: Dictionary) -> bool helper that checks the 3 sub-keys exist and have correct types. Call from _validate() after existing echo_memory dict check. Helper stays < 15 lines.

tasks.title: Validate biome_runs has all 8 biome keys in _validate()
tasks.description: SPECIALIST-9: _validate() checks biome_runs exists (is in required_keys) but not its sub-keys. If a save has biome_runs={} (empty dict), arc condition 'runs_in_biome' would silently return 0 for all biomes. Fix: after the existing faction_rep loop in _validate(), add a biome_runs loop: for biome in ['foret_broceliande','landes_bruyere','cotes_sauvages','villages_celtes','cercles_pierres','marais_korrigans','collines_dolmens','iles_mystiques']: if not biome_runs.has(biome): push_warning + return false. Or use MerlinConstants.BIOMES array if it exists.

tasks.title: Split _generate_procedural() 116 lines in merlin_skeleton_generator.gd
tasks.description: merlin_skeleton_generator.gd:162 — _generate_procedural() is 116 lines (2.3x limit). Extract: _build_main_path(), _build_detour_nodes(), _assign_card_types(). Each sub-function max 40 lines. Keep _generate_procedural as dispatcher ~20 lines.

tasks.title: Split activate_ogham() 94 lines in merlin_effect_engine.gd
tasks.description: merlin_effect_engine.gd:655 — activate_ogham() is 94 lines (nearly 2x limit). Extract: _validate_ogham_activation(), _apply_ogham_passive(), _apply_ogham_active(). Keep activate_ogham as dispatcher.

tasks.title: Split build_user_prompt() 92 lines in llm_adapter_map_prompt.gd
tasks.description: llm_adapter_map_prompt.gd:45 — build_user_prompt() is 92 lines. Extract: _build_params_section(), _build_player_context_section(), _build_arc_section(). Note: _build_arc_section() will be refactored by S2-ARC-CONDITION-EVAL — do AFTER that task.

tasks.title: Split check_run_end() 75 lines in store_run.gd
tasks.description: store_run.gd:202 — check_run_end() is 75 lines. Extract: _check_death_condition(), _check_escape_condition(), _handle_run_termination(). Keep check_run_end() as < 25 line dispatcher.

tasks.title: Implement IN_GAME_PERIODS faction bonus in card resolution
tasks.description: merlin_constants.gd:546-549 defines IN_GAME_PERIODS (aube/jour/crepuscule/nuit) each with faction bonuses. No code applies these at card resolution. Check current card index vs period card ranges, apply rep multiplier in _apply_faction_reputation.

tasks.title: Test faction ending unlock (>=80) triggers correct narrative route
tasks.description: Verify MerlinReputationSystem.get_available_endings() is called at run end when faction_rep>=80. Check game_flow_controller.gd run end sequence.

tasks.title: Test faction content unlock (>=50) gates special cards correctly
tasks.description: Verify cards with faction_required>=50 only appear when player faction_rep>=50. Check card filtering in merlin_card_system.gd.

tasks.title: Implement difficulty scaling per narrative context (bible s.6.3)
tasks.description: game_controller_minigame.gd:47 hardcodes base_diff=5 for all cards. Bible s.6.3: difficulty depends on card type (event=+1, Merlin Direct=no minigame). Add difficulty scaling: base by biome MOS score, +1 per card tier, +1 for event cards, +3 for critical (already done). Read card.difficulty or compute from biome maturity score.

tasks.title: Fix neutre field: add GAMES[neutre] to registry OR map neutre → esprit
tasks.description: merlin_constants.gd:338 FIELD_MINIGAMES has neutre:[apaisement,volonte]. MiniGameRegistry has no GAMES[neutre] → falls back to chance field. If a card has field=neutre, wrong minigame type is played. Fix: add GAMES[neutre]=[mg_apaisement,mg_volonte] to minigame_registry.gd:21, and add esprit to MerlinMiniGameSystem.VALID_FIELDS fallback for neutre. Also add detect_field() case for neutre → esprit.

tasks.title: Deduplicate minigame success SFX: base class vs controller both play minigame_success
tasks.description: minigame_base.gd:87 calls SFXManager.play(minigame_success) on success. game_controller_minigame.gd:100 also calls SFXManager.play(minigame_success). Result: success SFX plays twice. Fix: remove the SFX from minigame_base._complete() (base should not know about global SFX) and keep only in game_controller_minigame.gd which has full outcome context.

tasks.title: Test: all 8 lexical fields dispatch correct minigame scripts
tasks.description: Verify that for each of the 8 fields (chance,bluff,observation,logique,finesse,vigueur,esprit,perception): (1) detect_field() returns the correct field from representative text, (2) create_minigame(field) returns a non-null MiniGameBase subclass, (3) the returned script class matches expected field, (4) neutre field falls back to esprit correctly after MG-FIX-NEUTRE-FALLBACK. Reference: minigame_registry.gd GAMES dict.

tasks.title: Fix BUSH_MODELS: load bushes/ category instead of rocks/
tasks.description: broceliande_forest_3d.gd:68-72 BUSH_MODELS hardcoded to rocks/ category. Bush GLBs exist at Assets/bk_assets/bushes/foret_broceliande/ (6 variants) but are never loaded. Change BUSH_MODELS paths from rocks/ to bushes/ category: bush_bk_foret_broceliande_0000-0005.glb.

tasks.title: Add spawning for deadwood, groundcover, mushroom assets
tasks.description: Assets/bk_assets/deadwood/, /groundcover/, /mushrooms/ each have 6 foret_broceliande GLBs but forest_asset_spawner.gd has no code to load or spawn them. Add DEADWOOD_MODELS, GROUNDCOVER_MODELS, MUSHROOM_MODELS arrays to broceliande_forest_3d.gd and spawning calls in ForestZoneBuilder to enrich forest floor.

tasks.title: Fix BiomeWalkConfigs TILE_BASE: archive/ → Assets/Tiles/
tasks.description: biome_walk_configs.gd:8 TILE_BASE='res://archive/3d_models/Tiles_Low_Poly/' but terrain tiles are at res://Assets/Tiles/. Verify forest_terrain_builder.gd uses correct path. Also fix non-existent tile refs for villages_celtes (Tile_38_Path_Grass, Tile_34_Trans_Grass_Dirt) and cercles_pierres (Tile_39_Grass_Rocky) — replace with closest existing tiles (Tile_01 to Tile_31).

tasks.title: Add prop assets to BROC_ASSETS (prop_bk_foret_broceliande_0000-0005)
tasks.description: Assets/bk_assets/props/foret_broceliande/ has 6 prop GLBs (prop_bk_foret_broceliande_0000-0005.glb) never referenced in BROC_ASSETS. Add 3-4 as named entries (e.g. 'cauldron', 'campfire', 'cart', 'fence') to diversify zone 2 and zone 4 spawning.

tasks.title: Test: verify all BROC_ASSETS paths exist + bush category correct
tasks.description: Audit script or test checking: (1) all paths in TREE_MODELS, BUSH_MODELS, BROC_ASSETS exist on disk, (2) BUSH_MODELS uses bushes/ not rocks/ category, (3) no missing tile IDs in BiomeWalkConfigs. Write result to test_reports/.

tasks.title: Blender script: generate landes_bruyere 3D assets (6 variants each: vegetation, rocks, props)
tasks.description: Write tools/blender_scripts/gen_landes_bruyere.py procedurally generating heath/moor assets: low heather bushes, windswept gorse, stone cairns, weathered boulders, standing stones. Export to Assets/bk_assets/vegetation/landes_bruyere/ etc. Also write asset_requests/landes_bruyere.json spec.

tasks.title: Blender script: generate cotes_sauvages 3D assets (6 variants each: rocks, props, vegetation)
tasks.description: Write tools/blender_scripts/gen_cotes_sauvages.py procedurally generating coastal assets: sea-worn boulders, tidepools, driftwood, coastal shrubs, granite outcroppings, shell clusters. Export to Assets/bk_assets/rocks/cotes_sauvages/ etc. Also write asset_requests/cotes_sauvages.json spec.

tasks.title: Audit + document GameFlowController dead path (HubScreen/Run3D)
tasks.description: SPECIALIST-14 E2E CHK-14: game_flow_controller.gd + HubScreen.tscn + Run3D.tscn are a parallel game path never used in production (active path: HubAntre→BroceliandeForest3D→MerlinGame). audio_integration.gd wires to GameFlowController. Options: (A) Mark as archived, (B) Delete if confirmed dead, (C) Document as alternate path. First, create task to verify no production script instantiates GameFlowController. If truly dead: file a deletion/archive task. Priority LOW — no player impact, but creates confusion for future development.

tasks.title: E2E code trace: full game loop IntroCeltOS→Hub→Run→MerlinGame→EndScreen→Hub
tasks.description: SPECIALIST-14: Trace full player loop in code. CHK-1: IntroCeltOS._transition_to_menu sends to Menu3DPC. CHK-2: Menu3DPC has New Game button → SelectionSauvegarde. CHK-3: SelectionSauvegarde → HubAntre. CHK-4: HubAntre Partir button → BroceliandeForest3D. CHK-5: BroceliandeForest encounter signal fires → MerlinGame. CHK-6: MerlinGame run_ended → show_end_screen. CHK-7: EndScreen hub button → HubAntre. Check each signal/button connection for completeness.

tasks.title: GameManager creates MerlinStore via call_deferred — verify no scene accesses it before frame+1
tasks.description: SPECIALIST-14: game_manager.gd:677 uses get_tree().root.call_deferred('add_child', store) to create MerlinStore. This means MerlinStore is added AFTER the current frame. Risk: if any scene in the boot chain calls get_node_or_null('/root/MerlinStore') in _ready() during frame 0, it gets null. IntroCeltOS does NOT use MerlinStore (PASS). All gameplay scenes (HubAntre, MerlinGame) are reached after multiple scene transitions so MerlinStore exists by then. Verify: add debug print to game_manager _ready() and confirm call_deferred vs direct add_child. Low risk but worth documenting.

tasks.title: Fix BroceliandeForest3D fallback: change_scene_to_file → PixelTransition
tasks.description: SPECIALIST-14: broceliande_forest_3d.gd:1228 fallback path uses get_tree().change_scene_to_file(target) when PixelTransition not found. This is reachable if PixelTransition autoload fails to load. The primary path (line 1224) uses PixelTransition. Fix: add null guard pattern: var pt: Node = get_node_or_null('/root/PixelTransition'); if pt and pt.has_method('transition_to'): pt.transition_to(target) else: get_tree().change_scene_to_file(target). Line 1228 already does this — verify the guard is correct and consistent with other scene transition helpers.

tasks.title: Integration regression: verify all autoloads accessible + MerlinStore created
tasks.description: SPECIALIST-14: Regression test for autoload wiring. CHK-1: GameManager autoload in project.godot. CHK-2: MerlinAI autoload in project.godot. CHK-3: game_manager.gd:674 creates MerlinStore via call_deferred. CHK-4: merlin_game_controller.gd:112 store=get_node_or_null('/root/MerlinStore') gets non-null. CHK-5: merlin_game_controller.gd:121 merlin_ai=get_node_or_null('/root/MerlinAI') gets non-null. CHK-6: SFXManager+PixelTransition+I18nRegistry all in project.godot autoloads.

tasks.title: Fix studio_insights.json duplicate IDs (9x insight-20260414-001)
tasks.description: Deduplicate 25 entries into ~13 unique insights. Assign globally-sequential IDs (insight-NNN). Add ID generation guard: always increment from max existing ID.

tasks.title: Recover 60 missing completed tasks into completed_archive.json
tasks.description: completed_archive.json has 2 tasks but 62 were completed per metrics. Reconstruct from events.jsonl cycle summaries: extract task_id + summary + timestamp and create stub archive entries. Enforce housekeeping each cycle.

tasks.title: Sync studio_learnings.json metrics: cycles 40→47, add 5 missing agents
tasks.description: total_cycles_completed=40 but events.jsonl has 47 entries. Update to 47. Add missing agents to agent_performance: perf_code_quality_auditor, integration_e2e_auditor, faction_rep_auditor, minigame_system_auditor, 3d_scene_asset_auditor.

tasks.title: Add i18n/Localization Auditor to specialist roster documentation
tasks.description: No specialist audits I18nRegistry compliance. i18n rules in cycle_instructions.md but never enforced by any specialist. Define checklist: grep for hardcoded French strings, verify I18nRegistry.t() usage, check text_registry.json coverage.

tasks.title: Define Balance/Economy Auditor specialist checklist
tasks.description: No specialist verifies Anam economy (10 runs/node), MOS convergence (target 20-25, hard max 50), death penalty ratio, faction cap ±20/card. Define checklist and add as specialist role.

tasks.title: Add automated queue hygiene: auto-archive 'verified' type tasks each cycle
tasks.description: False-positive 'verified' type tasks (like E2E-PARCHMENT-PRERUN) should auto-archive at cycle start. Add housekeeping rule: tasks with type='verified' move to completed_archive.json with status='archived'.
